property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\eclipse\plugins\org.eclipse.justj.openjdk.hotspot.jre.full.win32.x86_64_21.0.8.v20250724-1412\jre\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:/eclipse//plugins/org.eclipse.justj.openjdk.hotspot.jre.full.win32.x86_64_21.0.8.v20250724-1412/jre/bin/server;C:/eclipse//plugins/org.eclipse.justj.openjdk.hotspot.jre.full.win32.x86_64_21.0.8.v20250724-1412/jre/bin;C:\maven\apache-maven-3.9.11\bin;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files (x86)\CheckPoint\Endpoint Security\Endpoint Common\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition 2025.2.5\bin;C:\Users\vahid.tyagi-ns\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\vahid.tyagi-ns\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\vahid.tyagi-ns\AppData\Local\Programs\Git\cmd;C:\Users\vahid.tyagi-ns\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\vahid.tyagi-ns\AppData\Local\Programs\cursor\resources\app\bin;C:\eclipse;;.

testcase.name: addBook[IFBN1001, Java Automation20](1)
testcase.system-out:
Request method: POST Request URI: http://216.10.245.166/Library/Addbook.php Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "name": "Learn Appium Automation with Java", "isbn": "IFBN1001", "aisle": "Java Automation20", "author": "John foer" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Wed, 11 Mar 2026 11:51:47 GMT Server: Apache Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Methods: POST Access-Control-Max-Age: 3600 Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, Access-Control-Allow-Headers, Authorization, X-Requested-With Keep-Alive: timeout=5, max=100 Connection: Keep-Alive Transfer-Encoding: chunked Content-Type: application/json;charset=UTF-8
{ "Msg": "successfully added", "ID": "IFBN1001Java Automation20" } ADD Response: {"Msg":"successfully added","ID":"IFBN1001Java Automation20"} Added Book ID: IFBN1001Java Automation20 Request method: POST Request URI: http://216.10.245.166/Library/DeleteBook.php Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "ID": "IFBN1001Java Automation20" } HTTP/1.1 404 Not Found Date: Wed, 11 Mar 2026 11:51:48 GMT Server: Apache Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Methods: POST Access-Control-Max-Age: 3600 Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, Access-Control-Allow-Headers, Authorization, X-Requested-With Keep-Alive: timeout=5, max=100 Connection: Keep-Alive Transfer-Encoding: chunked Content-Type: application/json;charset=UTF-8
{ "msg": "Delete Book operation failed, looks like the book doesnt exists" } Delete Response: {"msg":"Delete Book operation failed, looks like the book doesnt exists"} Deleted Book ID: IFBN1001Java Automation20
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details.
